item.title: Day 0 with GCP (Google Cloud)
item.description: GCP or Google Cloud Platform is the third largest cloud provider by marketshare(7%) behind AWS(32%) and Azure (19%)1. And it also figures in the “Leaders” quadrant along with the other two2. In this series, I will walk through some of the basic concepts of GCP and also create some side-projects as we go along. The first step is to enroll yourself for the free GCP account (with $300 credit - 90 days).
